meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Beat Idea Block
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS ideas. Master Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to rapidly prototype, validate, and launch your next high-revenue AI product.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' trap is simply a lack of technical velocity. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform abstract concepts into functional MVPs in hours, not weeks. This setup leverages AI-driven architectural scaffolding to iterate on revenue-generating features, turning market friction into your competitive advantage.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the graveyard of ambition. You’re staring at a cursor, paralyzed by the fear that your next idea isn't 'the one,' while the market moves on without you. The truth? Ideas are cheap; execution is the only currency that matters in the current SaaS landscape. You don't need a perfect plan; you need a prototype that proves demand.

This tutorial is your weaponized workflow. We’re bypassing the 'analysis paralysis' phase by utilizing Claude Code’s agentic capabilities alongside Antigravity to turn vague market signals into deployable code. This isn't about writing syntax; it's about building an engine that generates revenue. Let’s ship.

steps.title: Environment Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize your workspace with a structure designed for rapid iteration. We prioritize modularity so you can swap features based on user feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean SaaS boilerplate using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include authentication, a payment gateway integration module, and a structured folder layout for feature-based development.

steps.title: Market-Gap Analysis Injection
steps.description: Feed your niche research into the agent to ensure the codebase aligns with high-intent user problems.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following user pain points [insert data]. Suggest three high-leverage features that solve these problems and prioritize them based on implementation speed vs. monetization potential.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the current MVP requirements and identify the most critical revenue-generating feature to build first.'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Prototyping
steps.description: Build the core value proposition using Claude Code to scaffold the business logic, keeping the code lean and refactor-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic for the prioritized feature. Ensure the code is strictly typed and follows a service-oriented architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the stripe checkout flow for the subscription service'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Don't manually test your MVP. Force the AI to write unit tests that simulate real-world user workflows to ensure stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests for the new feature. Focus on edge cases that would impact user retention or billing.

steps.title: Deployment & Feedback Loop
steps.description: Push to production and monitor the metrics. Use the feedback loop to iterate before the market loses interest.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline script for Vercel that includes automated linting and deployment status notifications.

pro_tips: Treat Claude Code as a junior dev; always review the diff before merging to ensure architectural integrity.
Use Antigravity to document your API contracts; it prevents 'context drift' during long coding sessions.
Never build more than 48 hours of features without shipping to a live URL for real-user validation.
Keep your prompt library organized in a dedicated repo; your 'system prompts' are your intellectual property.
Always ask Claude to explain the 'why' behind a refactor; it accelerates your own understanding of system design.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on acquiring your first 10 paying users. Use the feedback from those users to direct your next Claude Code sprint.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea and start building the one that pays your bills. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
